title: The Mental Model Bridge
description: A diagram illustrating how a conceptual design acts as a bridge between a user's pre-existing mental model and the system's implemented model, aiming for alignment to achieve intuitive use.
relationships: The Conceptual Design is informed by and seeks to match the User's Mental Model
The System Model is built based on the Conceptual Design
A gap between the User's Mental Model and the System Model creates friction and a poor user experience
